bugs.summary: The proposed patch stops rejecting prose after the final workflow output section.
bugs.impact: The workflow output protocol requires exactly ordered sections with no outside text; accepting trailing prose can let malformed model output pass validation and contaminate artifacts.

requiredEvidence.quote: Return exactly these sections, in this order, with no prose outside the tags

acceptableFixes: Add a parser test with valid sections followed by extra prose.
mustNotSay: Trailing text is already inside refs/control; this check is specifically outside all sections.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Protocol correctness task; bug is a one-line guard but impact requires protocol context.

approval.notes: Second-wave draft; validate/materialize only. Requires calibration and provider review before lock.
